description: WHATS THE REASON FOR THE GERMAN ARMYS RETIREMENT What is the significance of Germanys retreat Hundreds of thousands of lives of brave men were sacrifices to conquer the vast area of territory that has been abandoned with only a semblance of resistance Why Military experts disagree Some see in it a movement to transfer men from the west for a formidable drive in the east or south and believe that the blow will be aimed against Russia with the expectation of rehabilitating the autocracy and forcing Russia to sue for a separate peace Others regard it as a move to mass a large army nearer home to check or suppress any in ternal disorder for the recent speech of the Chancellor of the Prussian Diet indicates that the government fears a revolt is de veloping The conclusion of the large majority of experts is that the Kaiser has been compelled to shorten the line because his army has been weakened by the serious loss of men and possible shortage of munitions and food and the retreat and surrender of the French territory was the only course left to maintain a firm wall of fighters in the west and prevent the
